name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Champaklal Is Lost
desc: Tappu loses Champaklal and starts searching for him all over Paris. Tappu finally decides to tell Daya about Champaklal missing. How will they find Champaklal?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Daya's Surprise
desc: Daya asks Jetha not to go to Office and help her. But Jetha insists on going and come back. But Daya tells him that if he takes a day off she give him a surprise. What is that surprise?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Waiting For Tappus Call
desc: Jetha and Tappus friends wait for Tapus call from paris. Everyone is worried. Meanwhile, Tapu and Champaklal parade around Paris and represent India in the competition.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jetha Fools Around With Tarak
desc: Daya makes yummy sweets and snacks for Jetha. Tarak visit Jetha's house and Jetha starts fooling around with him. Meanwhile, Tapu and Champaklal have fun in Paris.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Tapu Makes Everyone Proud
desc: All the people of Gokuldham are proud of Tapu for winning the quiz. Tapu and Jetha leave to represent India in the competition in Paris. Tapu and Jetha have a great time in Paris.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Tapu Sena Wins The Quiz
desc: Tapu Sena wins the quiz and the organizers are waiting for them at Jethas house. Tapu Sena are very happy and excited about winning the quiz. Everyone celebrates the occasion.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – The Dance Off
desc: All the people of Gokuldham dance and celebrate their victory against the super star. Even Shah Rukh Khan dances with them and celebrates.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – The Goodness Of Gokuldham
desc: Shah Rukh Khan reasons with the people of Gokuldham and tries to get them to leave Gokuldham so that he can buy the place. so everyone explains the goodness of Gokuldham and tells him that they wont leave the place no matter what.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – The Super Star
desc: Shah Rukh Khan appears in front of all the people of Gokuldham and everyone is thrilled. All the ladies have fallen for the super star's magic. But the super star doesn't seem too happy to see them.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – The Terms And Conditions
desc: Champaklal tells the lawyer that he'll somehow arrange the money and give him. The lawyer trusts Champaklal and lays out his terms and conditions. Will they abide by the rules?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – The Court Case
desc: All the men from Gokuldham return from the police station and head to Taraks place to discuss the situation. They tell Champaklal that the lawyers and asking a hefty fee. How will Gokuldham handle this situation.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – No Trespassing
desc: After the notice was issued, the government places a no trespassing board in front of the society gate. Roshan and the others get furious and start arguing with the workers.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – The Notice
desc: Bhide and Popatlal inform Tarak and Iyer about the notice received in the society. Everyone is very stressed out and gather for a meeting. What is the notice about?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Dayas Drama
desc: Daya welcomes Jetha they making him tea and snacks. She acts like a queen and enacts a scene. Jetha joins her in the act.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bhides Carom Skills
desc: Bhide and Popatlal play carom board and Bhide is really good at it. The kids come and appreciate Popatlal for helping them. Tapu informs Jetha that he has given his number to some internet quiz competition.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Football In Rain
desc: Tapu asks Jetha for money to buy a football as they want play it during the rain. Jetha refuses and says rather they should be playing cricket. Tapu convinces, Jetha gives in and warns him not to create any nuisance.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – The Misconception
desc: To everyones surprise, Kavita claims Taarak as her brother. Taarak clears the air and reveals the truth as what had exactly happened for which he had to hide all this from everyone. Taarak tells Anjali as how he had trying explaining her about the situation but she didnt pay heed to it.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal Is Shocked
desc: Jethalal spots Taarak with a girl. He thinks of confronting him but they went off. He decides to reveal the truth to Champaklal, Anjali and Daya about Taaraks new relationship. Anjali and Jetha tell their part of story to Champaklal.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal Lies To Champaklal
desc: Jethalal informs Anjali and Daya that Champaklal has come. He sings a devotional song to impress Champaklal and asks him to come to the balcony if he wants to hear more of it. Anjali sneaks into their home with the help of Daya.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Daya Sympathizes With Anjali
desc: Anjali cries and tells Daya as to how much she loves Taarak. She regrets making him eat all the diet food and less oily food. Daya tells her not to cry and wash her face, she will feel fresh. Anjali overhears Daya and Jetha's conversation that Taarak had lied to Jetha about him being busy with office work.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Anjali Breaks Down
desc: When Daya asks Anjali the reason behind her sadness, she breaks down. Crying, she tells Daya that Taarak has another woman in his life. Daya is shocked and pacifies her.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Taarak Makes Way For Suspicion
desc: Anjali asks Taarak to take a bath and he takes his laptop with him. She asks him if he wants to destroy the laptop and tries to take it from him, he runs around with it. Taarak talks to a girl on social media and writes a poetry for her.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Anjali Is Suspicious
desc: Taarak comes home late and soon gets a call. Anjali asks him about who is calling him so late. She finds out that he has already had his dinner and didn't even think of informing her about it. Anjali tries to check his phone but he stops her, she asks him the reason.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jetha Splattered With Mud
desc: Champaklal screams looking at Jethas condition. He asks him to go out and get it cleaned before he enters the house. Iyer clicks a photo of Jetha cleaning his body and tells him that he will be showing this to everyone in the society.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Dance In The Rain
desc: All the ladies of Gokuldham dance happily in the rain. Champaklal spots them, Daya makes an excuse. He taunts them as he has seen them dancing. Jethalal forgets to wear his shirt. Everyone discusses their good old romantic days.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Daya Plays Peek-A-Boo
desc: Daya hides near the bed and asks Jetha to find her. She gets romantic with Jetha. She makes him wear a raincoat to prevent getting drenched in the rain. Everyone gets into a fight for the rickshaw.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jetha Praises Bhide
desc: The members of Gokuldham society decide to felicitate Bhide and Taarak tells everyone how good of a person and a friend he is. Just as Taarak is speaking, Jetha gets up and requests that he wants to say something about Bhide and his friendship.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – The Anger
desc: Popatlal sends a shocking video clip - Popatlal finds a safer place in the Gokuldham society to hide. Gokuldham Society members get anger with Popatlal. Popatlal sends a shocking video clip to all the members of Gokuldham society.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Popatlal Causes Trouble
desc: Popatlal lands in deep trouble - Popatlal reveals to Khote that he has to teach an unforgettable lesson to all the members of Gokuldham society who are making fun of him as he is still unmarried. Khote assures Popatlal that he will not drag him in Bhides court case

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Cricket Andolan
desc: Nattu Kaka and Bagha inform Jethalal about a suspicious person whom they saw entering in Khote Classes. Jethalal comes up with an interesting idea and Daya supports him. Tapu Sena too comes up with an interesting idea. Will Bagha and Nattu Kaka succeed in finding the spy?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Daya Has A Suggestion
desc: Daya tells Jetha that her mother has a solution to all the problems.atu kaka and Baga overhears Iyers conversation with the auto driver and think of informing Jetha about this right away. Jetha asks them to keep an eye on Iyers intentions.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Khote Is Alarmed
desc: Khote gets to know that Bhide has collected all the proofs against him. He receives a call from a well wisher who plans a conspiracy with him. Khote has come to know that Gokuldham has nothing against him and were trying to fool him.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Daya Blabbers
desc: Jetha calls Daya and asks for breakfast. Daya tells him that her mother has a name for Jetha. Jetha is furious and asks as why she has a name for him everyday, to which Daya blabbers against Jetha.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Erroneous Proofs
desc: Coaching head presents the proofs. Police talks to the Gokuldham people and says he still needs proof from them to take action against the guilty. Khote thinks of playing mind games with the people of Gokuldham society.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Gokuldhams Unity
desc: Gokuldham comes to the police station to file an FIR against the coaching center. Jethalal presents proof to the police and the police decide to take action against him. Jetha's phone is damaged before further proceedings.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Coaching Head Threatens Bhide
desc: Bhide is threatened to not reveal the truth to anyone. Coaching head comes out and traps Bhide in false accusations. Bhide tells Madhvi and Sonu about how that teacher tricked him and has threatened him.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bhides House Locked
desc: Taarak and friends reach Bhides place only to find his house locked. Champaklal asks everyone to call Bhide and check on him. Tapu Sena stands with Bhide and ask to join them. Everyone finds Sonus photo in the coaching centre.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal Reveals The Truth
desc: Jetha accuses Bhide of being selfish. He shouts at Bhide as to why he sent Sonu to the private tuition, without letting others know about this. Bhide tries to clear the false allegations against him.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Iyer Praises Bhide
desc: Iyer says Bhide makes him remember Subramanium and thanks him for all the efforts. Taarak asks Jetha about the surprise he was about to give. Jetha waits for the right moment.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal Is Upset
desc: Jetha is still upset with Bhide and has dressed differently. Taarak addresses Bhide and family and praises them. Tapu Sena offers a song to him. Daya asks Jetha if he is upset.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jetha Is Furious With Bhide
desc: Jetha thinks Bhide has lied to him. Jetha decides to inform everyone about this at the party. He thinks of sharing this with Taarak first but waits for the right moment.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – The Coaching Scam
desc: Jethalal reaches a coaching institute where he finds Sonus photo. They claim Sonu as their student for which she has topped in her school. The coaching head tells Jetha as to how Sonu was getting private tuition.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bhide Is All Praises
desc: Everyone thanks Bhide for being a good teacher. Popatlal asks Bhide if he has given more attention to Sonu. Gokuldham society plans for a celebration for Bhide. Jetha informs Taarak about Tapus result.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Daya Scares Popatlal
desc: Popatlal wishes the kids all the very best so that they get good marks. He is about to step down when Daya stops him saying that a cat has just crossed that path and that he should not be walking down the same path. Jetha asks Daya about the result, Daya scares him as well as explains to him about it.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Daya Interrupts Jetha
desc: Jetha is about to leave for his shop, meets Babita in the compound. Daya calls out to Jetha from the balcony to which Jetha becomes furious. Later, Daya tells Jetha how he is wearing a shirt with a hole.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Taarak Counsels Jetha - Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
desc: Taarak explains Jetha as to how it is important to take results lightly and scolding thee kids is not the solution. Daya messes up with the food that she prepared. Goli tells how kids these days know how to achieve their goals in life.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Dreams And Imagination
desc: All the parents dream about their kids achieving their goals. Daya panics and asks Jetha to go out as she feels there could be an earthquake. Besides results, Jetha is worried about Tapus aim in life.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Mr. And Mrs. Sodhi Surprised
desc: Mr. and Mrs. Sodhi are back. Daya asks them to have lunch and then leave for their home. The Sodhis are surprised to see that the house is cleaned and decorated by all the ladies of Gokuldham. Tapu Sena is worried about the result.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – The Mystery Unfolds
desc: They discuss the trucks that had come to deliver the goods. Gokuldham society praises Dharmendra for his work and contribution to Bollywood. Police tell he has to arrest Jetha for creating all the confusion.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Dharam Garam Interacts
desc: Dharmendra interacts with everyone and praises them. Daya asks him if he wants to have anything, she would prepare any cuisine for him. They discuss all the movies he has worked in.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bollywoods Muscle Man In Society
desc: Daya checks the second truck only to find cartons of apples. Jetha cracks the riddle and tells everyone that superstar Dharmendra is the one who has sent the truck full of goods for them. Finally, the truck is unloaded.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Champaklal Goes Insane
desc: Everyone asks Jetha to call Natu and Baga to confirm if the trucks belong to them. They deny getting any trucks parked in Gokuldham Society. Champaklal shouts on top of his voice and asks who is the one doing this. Jetha finds Iyers name written on a canvas bag.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – The Mystery Man
desc: Bhide and Jetha find out that the man lying below the truck does not belong to the society and is sleeping. Suspecting him to be the truck driver, they try to wake him up.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jetha Being Accused
desc: Bhide blames for the trucks being parked in society. Daya suspects Sunderlal. Sunderlal denies allegations against him. Jetha and Bhide find someone lying below the truck.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Daya Gets Romantic
desc: Daya calls up Jetha to inform him that she won't be cooking anything for dinner. Hence, she asks him to get something packed from outside to have. Daya expresses her love for him. Everyone asks about the trucks that have been parked in the society.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – The Great Grand Confusion
desc: Jetha gets the tickets by train and Champaklal's friend gets tickets by bus. Baga gets a taxi asks the driver to drop them off at the railway station but Champaklal asks him to drop them off at the bus stop. He shouts at Jetha for getting the tickets at a higher price.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jetha Finds A Way
desc: A customer comes to Jethalals shop who happens to be an agent. Jetha asks him if he can help get him two tickets. Later, that agent gets a call and he informs that all the tickets have been sold out. Champaklal decides to travel by bus.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Champaklal Has Decided
desc: Champaklal decides to go to the village. Jetha calls Baga to know if he had got the tickets. Champaklal is shocked to know the highly-priced tickets. He is adamant to go by the railways.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Champaklal's Good Old Days
desc: Jetha finally gets a bat for Tapu and some mangoes for everyone. A guest arrives who happens to be Champaklal's friend. He starts telling Champaklal's stories, as to how brave and naughty he used to be.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bhide Creates Chaos
desc: Bhide calls everyone and explains them the mistakes Tapu Sena has committed. Champaklal comes and asks Tapu about what exactly happened. He convinces Bhide as to how their way of helping Sonu was wrong but their intention was not.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jetha Gets Mad With Excitement
desc: Sonu calls Tapu Sena to help her out but they are locked inside. Jethalal overhears Nattu and Baga's conversation and thinks they have received a big order. Bhide is shocked to find Tapu Sena inside his home.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Tapu Tries To Convince Jethalal
desc: Tapu and Daya convince Jetha to get Tapu a seasoned bat. Jetha refuses to spend a huge amount for a bat. Bhide does not allow Sonu to go out and play with Tapu Sena instead asks her to sit at home and study. Jetha talks to Bhide regarding this.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Tapu Fools Jetha And Daya
desc: Tapu pretends to be Champaklal and Jetha starts explaining himself. Later, Daya and Jetha look for the differences and find out that it was Tapu who tried fooling them. Tapu asks Daya for a favour.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jetha's Sweet Gesture
desc: Jetha forgets to bring what Champaklal told him to. Jetha hands him the apology card that he had got for Babita. Champaklal shouts at him for getting an over-priced card. Jetha gets Kulfi for everyone. Daya tells Jetha as to how he was being praised by everyone.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jetha Gets A Card For Babita
desc: Natu Kaka and Baga suggest Jetha get a Sorry card for Babita. Jetha finally finds the note where he had noted down the number. Jetha thanks Daya for her prayers for which he managed to find that note.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Babita Looks For Jetha
desc: Babita waits for Jetha so that she can get the file. But when Babita calls Jetha he tells Nattu Kaka to attend the call. Meanwhile, Baga goes out to search for the file so that Jetha can give the file to Babita.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Iyer Gets Jealous
desc: Iyer calls Babita and she picks up thinking that it was Jetha. Iyer gets jealous and questions her. He then tells her not to wait for his call and that hell handle the situation.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Daya Apolozies To Jetha
desc: Jetha forgets his file at home because of Daya. He goes back home to get the file and returns to the shop. Jetha reaches the shop and finally signs the cheque. Daya calls Jetha and apolozies to him.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – The Signature Situation
desc: Jetha gets a call from Nattu Kaka, who informs him that he has forgotten to sign a cheque. But Jetha informs him that he can't go to the shop now as he has a meeting with a client. How will Jetha handle this situation?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Gogi Ruins The Plan
desc: Finally, everyone convinces the keeper that Babita and Iyer are the real parents of Gogi. The keeper believes them and agrees to let Gogi go. But Gogi ruins the plan by telling everyone that they managed to fool the keeper in front of the keeper himself.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Anjali's Plan For Iyer And Babita
desc: Anjali comes up with a plan to save Gogi. Everyone plans to dress up Babita and Iyer as a Punjabi couple and present them to the keeper so that they can bring back Gogi.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jetha And Daya On A Mission
desc: Jetha and Daya visit the grove to talk to the keeper and bring back Gogi. They try to reason with him to get him back. Will Jetha and Daya bring back Gogi?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jetha Handles The Situation
desc: Gogi is stuck in the tree and Tapu Sena seeks the society's help to bring back Gogi. Meanwhile, Gogis parents call Jetha to check on Gogi. How will Jetha handle the situation now?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Tapu Sena Gets Caught
desc: Tapu Sena gets caught after breaking into the Mango grove. They try to talk their way out of trouble. The keeper of the grove asks them to bring their parents. Will they let Gogi go without any trouble?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Tapu Sena On A Mango Mission
desc: Tapu Sena break into a grove to pick mangoes. Tapu climbs a tree and starts plucking the mangoes. Will they get out without getting caught?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Iyer Trash Talks Jetha
desc: Bhide and the others wait for Jetha and Taarak so that they can get done with the meeting. Iyer tells everyone not to trust Jetha as he might have gone to drink soda with Taarak. Finally, they get to the discussion.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Daya Defends The Children
desc: Daya and the ladies to go to have some street food and run into a lady who talks against the kids. Daya defends the kids and explains what a bliss they are.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Decision Of The Society
desc: Tarak scolds everyone for acting like children and calling an unofficial meeting to discuss the problem. Everyone decides that the children should not play cricket until the society decides to let them.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Cancelled Cricket
desc: Tapu and his friends play cricket in the society and give everyone a hard time. Everyone gathers and decides to cancel cricket. But will Tapu Sena agree to this?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jetha Is Upset
desc: Gogi and Tapu return from school after exams and Jetha is worried that he wont be able to handle both Tapu and Gogi. Employees of Gada electronics help Jetha to come up with a plan to keep the kids busy.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Finding Gogis ID Card
desc: Gogi loses his ID card and gives everyone a hard time about it. Everyone searches everywhere. Finally they gather and decide to search for it inside Gogis bag. Will they find it there?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Champaklal Sits On Jetha
desc: Jetha couldnt sleep in his bed because of Gogi so he sleeps on the couch. Champaklal sit on the couch without seeing Jetha who is sleeping there.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Everyone Praises Bhide
desc: Gogi shoots up his gun and the stick is stuck to the roof. Iyer and Jetha wonder how they;ll get it down. Jetha shares the same with Bhide, Tarak and everyone praises Bhide for handling all the children during tuition.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Gogi Troubles Everyone
desc: Gogi is now staying in Jethas house. Gogi behaves the same as he does at his place. Jetha finds it very annoying. Jetha goes along with him.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jetha Shares The Secret
desc: Jetha gets a gift for Gogi because Roshani is not here. It was Dayas idea to get the gift. Babita and Iyer didnt know anout this so Jetha tells them everything.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – A Task For Bagha
desc: Jethalal gives a unique task to Baagha - All the members of Gokuldham society are taking extra care of Googi as Roshan and Sodhi are in Amritsar. Baagha assures Jethalal that he will complete his task. Bapuji gets scared of Googi.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – The Trip To Amritsar
desc: Taarak tries to solve Roshans problem - Daya, Roshan and Bhide rush to Taarak Mehtas house as Roshan urgently wants to leave for Amritsar. Taarak tries to solve Roshans problem. Jethalal, Baagha and Natu Kaka end up in comical argument. Emotional moment takes place between Googi and his Mother Roshan.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Emergency At Roshans Place
desc: Emergency in Roshans house - Jethalal feels prod that he caught the bag with one hand. All the members of Gokuldham society are trying to catch Googi who is strictly disagreeing to go to School until and unless Sodhi does not wish him all the best. Babuji gets angry with Bhide. There is an emergency in Roshans house.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – The Decision
desc: Sheru reveals his final decision. Sheru's owner, Robert, assures Jethalal and other Gokuldham members that they can come to meet Sheru whenever they want. All the members of Gokuldham society get extremely emotional.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – The Confession
desc: Changu and Mangu apologize to Jethalal and also reveal a shocking truth to all the members of Gokuldham Society. Inspector Chalu Pandey gets angry with Jethalal.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – The Kidnappers
desc: Changu and Mangu get special treatment - Jethalal is immensely missing Sheru. All the members of Gokuldham society are extremely happy and excited as Shery returns to Gokuldham society. Kidnappers have entered in Gokuldham society.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – The Advertisement
desc: Popatlal is searching for Sheru far and wide. Jetha decides to give a prize of 5 Lakh rupees to anyone who finds Sheru and brings him back home safely.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Popatlal Is Rude To Chalu Pandey
desc: Taarak's master plan to find Sheru - Popatlal, Bhide and Jethalal give more information about Sheru to Inspector Chalu Pandey. Popatlal talks rudely with Chalu Pandey. All the Female members of Gokuldham society are eagerly waiting for Sheru's arrival. All the members are immensely missing Sheru.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Sheru Goes Missing
desc: Sheru goes missing - All the members of Gokuldham society are searching Sheru in the colony. Jethalal, Taarak, Popatlal, Bhide and Mr. Iyer file a missing complaint of Sheru in the police station and also request Chalu Pandey to search Sheru.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – A Dog House
desc: The female members of Gokuldham society decide to build a Dog House for Sheru, but Bhide has an option. Chameli Bhai gets introduced to Gokuldham members with regards to building a Dog House for Sheru.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Popatlals Dreams Of Marriage
desc: Yesterday's walk in the park was very exciting, as Sheru, along everyone else, met Pari. Popatlal is expecting Paris parents to come for him with a marriage proposal. Is Popatlal finally going to be happily married?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethas Prank
desc: Jetha sticks a thepla on Iyers back and sees the fun as Iyer is chased around by Sheru. Iyer is scared for his life and starts running.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Himmatwala
desc: When Daya calls up Ajay to tell him about Jetha hurting her, he comes to the society to see what is going on and Jetha apologizes.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Daya Talks To Ajay
desc: Jetha accuses Daya of being manipulative and calls her cunning. Daya is hurt and she decides to call her brother who is away from home - Ajay Devgn.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Keeping Away Sheru
desc: Jetha has many more ways of keeping Sheru away from the society, but all seem to fail. Dayaben tries to get the two to get befriended, but Jetha is not ready for it. Theplas are a great bond though. How will Jetha work this out?
